blocker.detail: GitHub REST API blocked by DNS monitoring proxy in sandbox — repo creation requires manual step.
blocker.resolution: 1. Create repo 'purewide3.0' at https://github.com/new (empty, no auto-init). 2. From hub repo root: cd purewide3 && git init && git checkout -b main && git remote add origin https://github.com/carlosperez1986/purewide3.0.git && git add . && git commit -m 'feat: initial scaffold' && git push -u origin main
